message:
feat(node): add policy activation diagnostics to doctor command and replace unreachable with panic

Add --policy-activation-input flag to doctor subcommand for live guardrail
diagnostics including Bayesian ranking, guardrail certificates, decision
engine pass-through, and policy explanation rendering. Also replace
unreachable!() with panic!() across all crate modules for correct clippy
lint compliance in match arms that represent logic errors rather than
truly unreachable code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -639,6 +639,10 @@ pub struct DoctorArgs {
     #[arg(long)]
     pub profile: Option<String>,
 
+    /// Path to policy activation input JSON for live guardrail diagnostics.
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub policy_activation_input: Option<PathBuf>,
+
     /// Emit machine-readable JSON report.
     #[arg(long)]
     pub json: bool,
